---
title: "Veganscreener metabolomics - Figures"
format: 
  html:  
    embed-resources: true
    keep-md: false
    toc: true
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-depth: 6
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 6
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Open code"
    grid: 
      body-width: 1000px
      sidebar-width: 600px
      margin-width: 100px
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
editor: source
project:
  type: default
  output-dir: output
fontsize: 12 px
---

This code shows all the figures reported in the original publication of this study. 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplotify)
source("custom_functions_vegans.R")
```

# Figure 2

```{r}
load("../results/vegan/figures/F2a_permanovaVar.RData")
f2a <- f
load("../results/vegan/figures/F2b_PcaCorr.RData")
f2b <- f 
```

```{r,fig.width=15,fig.height=7}
(f2a|f2b)
```

```{r}
labels = c("country_ES" = "Country (ES)",
           "country_CH" = "Country (CH)",
           "country_DE" = "Country (DE)",
           "country_BE" = "Country (BE)",
          "country_CZ" = "Country (CZ)",
          "country" = "Country",
           "VS_total" = "Veganscreener score",
          "VS_total_plus" = "Veganscreener score (+)",
            "VS_total_minus" = "Veganscreener score (-)",
           "sex" = "Sex",
           "UPF_perc_avg" = "UPF",
           "age" = "Age",
            "bmi" = "BMI",
          "diet_supplements" = "Supplementation",
          "vegan_duration" = "Vegan diet duration",
           "pdi_an_avg" = "PDI",
          "updi_an_avg" = "uPDI",
          "hpdi_an_avg" = "hPDI")

f2a <- f2a + scale_x_discrete(labels=labels) + ggtitle("")
f2b <- f2b + scale_y_discrete(labels=labels) + ggtitle("") 

```

```{r,fig.width=14,fig.height=7}
(f2a | f2b) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5)) & 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 20, face = 'bold')) 

```

```{r}
p <- (f2a | f2b) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5)) & 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 20, face = 'bold')) 

ggsave(plot=p,"../results/vegan/figures/Figure_2.png", height=7,width=14)
```

# Figure 3

```{r}
load("../results/vegan/figures/F3a_ROCcountry.RData")
f3a <- f
load("../results/vegan/figures/F3b_CMcountry.RData")
f3b <- f 
load("../results/vegan/figures/F3c_CountryHeatmap.RData")
f3c <- f 
load("../results/vegan/figures/F3d_CountryPDI.RData")
f3d <- f 
```

```{r,fig.width=12,fig.height=12}
design <- "
AB
AB
C#
CD
CD
C#
"

(f3a_free <- free(f3a + ggtitle(""), side = "l"))
f3a_free + f3b + f3c + f3d +
  plot_layout(design  = design,
              widths  = c(1, 2),     # NOW these actually apply
              heights = c(1,1, 0.3,1, 1,1,1)) +  # row1 = A/B; C spans rows 2–3; D = row 2 only
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
        plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20))
```


```{r}
p <- f3a_free + f3b + f3c + f3d +
  plot_layout(design  = design,
              widths  = c(1, 2),     # NOW these actually apply
              heights = c(1,1, 0.3,1, 1,1,1)) +  # row1 = A/B; C spans rows 2–3; D = row 2 only
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(3, 3, 3, 3),
        plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20))
```

```{r}
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_3.png", height=12,width=12)
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_3.pdf", height=12,width=12)
```

# Figure 4

## Prepare

```{r}
load("../intermediate_files/models/adjusted_vstotal_model_vegan/rf_model.RData")
vs_model <- rf_model
load("../intermediate_files/models/adjusted_pdi_model_vegan/rf_model.RData")
pdi_model <- rf_model
load("../intermediate_files/models/adjusted_hpdi_model_vegan/rf_model.RData")
hpdi_model <- rf_model
load("../intermediate_files/models/adjusted_updi_model_vegan/rf_model.RData")
updi_model <- rf_model
load("../intermediate_files/models/adjusted_upf_model_vegan/rf_model.RData")
upf_model <- rf_model

model_objects <- list(vs_model,updi_model,upf_model)
names(model_objects) <- c("Veganscreener score", "uPDI","UPF")

```

```{r}
source("custom_functions_vegans.R")
```

```{r}
make_multi_roc_curve_indexes <- function(model_objects,CI=FALSE){
  roc_c <- ggplot()
  colors <- c("darkgreen","#F2A93B", "#0072B2")
  #colors <- c("darkorange", "#C9884B","#F2A93B")
  #lts  <- c("solid",  "dashed", "dotted")

  names(colors) <- names(model_objects)
  groups <- names(model_objects)
  for (group in groups){
    model_object <- model_objects[[group]]
    color <- colors[group]
    if (CI){
    
    auc_val <- model_object$model_summary$auc
    aucs <- sapply(model_object$kfold_rocobjs,function(df) df$auc)
    q1_auc <- quantile(aucs, probs = 0.025)
    q3_auc <- quantile(aucs, probs = 0.975)
    
    differences <- abs(aucs - q1_auc)
    min_auc <- which.min(differences)
    
    differences <- abs(aucs - q3_auc)
    max_auc <- which.min(differences)
    
    differences <- abs(aucs - auc_val)
    true_auc <- which.min(differences)
    
    c <- model_object$kfold_rocobjs[[true_auc]]
    ggroc_data_c <- ggroc(c)$data
    
    # Create a common set of x-axis points
    x_common <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 100)
    my_df <- data.frame(x=x_common)
    
    for (j in 1:length(aucs)){
      # get ggrocdata
      ggroc_data <- ggroc(model_object$kfold_rocobjs[[j]])$data
      
      # adjust the lowest and highest numbers
      ggroc_data$`1-specificity` <- 
        ggroc_data$`1-specificity` + (1:nrow(ggroc_data))/(1e+20)
      ggroc_data$`1-specificity`[nrow(ggroc_data)] <- 1
      
      # approximation (for equal axis coordinates)
      y_aprox <- approx(
        ggroc_data$`1-specificity`, 
        ggroc_data$sensitivity, xout = x_common)$y
      
      my_df <- cbind(my_df,y_aprox)
    }
    
    my_df <- my_df %>% column_to_rownames("x")
    q1_y <- c()
    q2_y <- c()
    q3_y <- c()
    for (j in 1:length(x_common)){
      q1_y <- c(q1_y,quantile(as.numeric(my_df[j,]), 
                              probs = 0.025,na.rm=TRUE))
      q2_y <- c(q2_y,mean(as.numeric(my_df[j,])))
      q3_y <- c(q3_y,quantile(as.numeric(my_df[j,]), 
                              probs = 0.975,na.rm=TRUE))
    }
    df <- data.frame(x = x_common, 
                     y1 = q1_y, 
                     y2 = q3_y, 
                     y3 = q2_y,
                     Model=group)
    df[is.na(df)] <- 0
    
    my_color <- color
    
    roc_c <- roc_c + 
      geom_ribbon(data=df,
                  aes(x =x,ymin = pmin(y1, y2), ymax = pmax(y1, y2),
                      fill=Model), 
                  alpha = 0.3,
                  show.legend = TRUE) +
      geom_line(data=df,aes(x=x, y = y3, color=Model),
                size=1.5) + 
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(panel.border = 
              element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0),
            panel.grid = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.x = 
              element_line(size=0.3,color = "black"),
            axis.ticks.y = 
              element_line(size=0.3,color="black"),
            axis.ticks.length = unit(4,"pt"),
            axis.text=element_text(face="bold"),
            axis.title = element_text(face="bold",size=15),
            legend.position = c(0.98, 0.02),
            legend.justification = c("right", "bottom")) + 
      ylab("Sensitivity") + xlab("1-specificity") + 
      scale_color_manual(values=colors) + 
      scale_fill_manual(values=colors)
 
  }
  }
  
  
  return(roc_c)
}
```

```{r}
p <- make_multi_roc_curve_indexes(model_objects,CI=TRUE)
```

```{r}
f <- p
save(f,file="../results/vegan/figures/F4c_ROC.RData")
```

```{r}
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS_ROC.RData")
```

```{r}
f <- p
save(f,file="../results/vegan/figures/FS_ROC.RData")
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
pdf("../results/vegan/Q3b_UPF/roc_all.pdf",width = 6,height = 5)
p
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Figure: Metabolomic Associations of VGscore and PDI Sub-indices
# Panel A: PERMANOVA R² and AUC grouped bar chart
# Panel B: Metabolite direction heatmap
# ============================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)

index_colors <- c(
  "Veganscreener score"    = "darkgreen",
  "Veganscreener score (+)"   = "#74C69D",
  "Veganscreener score (-)"   = "#B7E4C7",
  "PDI"   = "darkorange",
  "hPDI"  = "#C9884B",
  "uPDI"  = "#F2A93B",
  "UPF" = "#0072B2"
)

# ---- PANEL A DATA ------------------------------------------
perf_data <- tibble(
  Index   = factor(rep(c("Veganscreener score","Veganscreener score (+)","Veganscreener score (-)", "PDI","hPDI","uPDI","UPF"), 2),
                   levels = c("Veganscreener score","Veganscreener score (+)","Veganscreener score (-)", "PDI","hPDI","uPDI","UPF")),
  Metric  = rep(c("PERMANOVA R² (%)", "AUC"), each = 7),
  Value   = c(2.60, 1.80, 2.27, 0.22 , 2.01, 2.12, 1.49, # PERMANOVA
              0.74, 0.69, 0.64, 0.48, 0.66, 0.69, 0.62), # AUC
  CI_low  = c(rep(NA, 7),   # no CI for PERMANOVA
              0.64, 0.61, 0.54, 0.37, 0.62, 0.60, 0.46),  # AUC CIL
  CI_high = c(rep(NA, 7),
              0.82, 0.78, 0.73, 0.58, 0.75, 0.78, 0.69),  # AUC CIU
  Sig     = c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE,
              NA,   NA,   NA,   FALSE,   NA,   NA, FALSE)
)

# reference lines per facet
ref_lines <- tibble(
  Metric = c("PERMANOVA R² (%)", "AUC"),
  yref   = c(NA, 0.5)
)

p_permanova <- ggplot(perf_data %>% dplyr::filter(Metric=="PERMANOVA R² (%)"), aes(x = Index, y = Value, fill = Index)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  # mark non-significant bars with "ns"
  geom_text(data = filter(perf_data, Metric == "PERMANOVA R² (%)", !Sig),
            aes(label = "ns", y = Value + 0.05),
            size = 3, colour = "grey40", fontface = "italic") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = index_colors, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "R² (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(face = "bold",angle=60,hjust = 1),
    plot.title       = element_blank()
  ) 

p_auc <- ggplot(perf_data %>% dplyr::filter(Metric=="AUC"), aes(x = Index, y = Value, fill = Index)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = filter(perf_data, Metric == "AUC"),
    aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high),
    width = 0.22, colour = "grey25", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  # mark non-significant bars with "ns"
  geom_text(data = filter(perf_data, Metric == "AUC", !Sig),
            aes(label = "ns", y = CI_high + 0.05),
            size = 3, colour = "grey40", fontface = "italic") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = index_colors, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUC") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(face = "bold",angle=60,hjust = 1),
    plot.title       = element_blank()
  ) 

```

```{r}
f <- p_permanova
save(f,file="../results/vegan/figures/F4a_R2.RData")

f <- p_auc
save(f,file="../results/vegan/figures/F4b_AUC.RData")
```

## Plot

```{r}
load("../results/vegan/figures/F4a_R2.RData")
f4a <- f
load("../results/vegan/figures/F4b_AUC.RData")
f4b <- f 
load("../results/vegan/figures/F4c_ROC.RData")
f4c <- f 
```

```{r,fig.height=4,fig.width=12}
design <- "
ABC
"
f4a_free <- free(f4a, side = "lb") 
f4b_free <- free(f4b, side = "lb") 
f4c_free <- free(f4c, side = "lb") 

p <- f4a_free + f4b_free + f4c_free + 
  plot_layout(design  = design,
              widths  = c(0.8, 0.9,1)) + 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(3, 3, 3),
        plot.tag    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20))

p
```

```{r}
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_4.png", height=4,width=12)
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_4.pdf", height=4,width=12)
```

# Figure 5

## Prepare

```{r}
# ---- colour palette ----------------------------------------
col_up   <- "#d73027"   # warm orange  → positive association
col_down <- "#4575b4"   # steel blue   → negative association
col_na   <- "grey92"   # light grey   → not significant

```

```{r}
vs_total <- fread("../results/vegan/Q2_VStotal/lm_continous.tsv")
vs_total_plus <- fread("../results/vegan/Q2_VStotal_plus/lm_continous.tsv")
vs_total_minus <- fread("../results/vegan/Q2_VStotal_minus/lm_continous.tsv")
pdi <- fread("../results/vegan/Q3a_PDI//lm_continous.tsv")
hpdi <- fread("../results/vegan/Q3a_hPDI/lm_continous.tsv")
updi <- fread("../results/vegan/Q3a_uPDI/lm_continous.tsv")
upf <- fread("../results/vegan/Q3b_UPF//lm_continous.tsv")
```

```{r}
all_df <- rbind(vs_total,vs_total_plus,vs_total_minus,
                pdi,hpdi,updi,upf)

var_levels <- c(
  "VS_total"       = "Veganscreener score",
  "VS_total_plus"  = "Veganscreener score (+)",
  "VS_total_minus" = "Veganscreener score (-)",
  "pdi_an_avg"            = "PDI",
  "hpdi_an_avg"           = "hPDI",
  "updi_an_avg"           = "uPDI",
  "UPF_perc_avg"   = "UPF"
)

metabolite_labels <- fix_labels(NULL,get_labels = TRUE)
wide_df <- all_df %>%
  mutate(
    # direction from the Estimate, only when significant
    direction = case_when(
      Estimate > 0 ~  1L,
      Estimate < 0 ~ -1L,
      TRUE                             ~  0L
    ),
    Metabolite = recode(metabolite, !!!metabolite_labels), 
    variable   = recode(variable,   !!!var_levels)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Metabolite, variable, direction) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = direction,
              values_fill = 0L) %>%                          # missing combos -> 0
  dplyr::select(Metabolite, `Veganscreener score`, `Veganscreener score (+)`, `Veganscreener score (-)`,
         PDI, hPDI, uPDI,UPF)
```

```{r}
# order metabolites by biological cluster (manual grouping)
cluster_order <- c(
  # omega-3 / phospholipids (positive)
  "LysoPC (22:6)", "PC (40:6)", "PA (44:5)", "LysoPC (17:0)",
  # antioxidant / gut microbiome
  "Indoleacrylic acid", "Ergothioneine", "Acetylornithine",
  "Glutamine", "Phenylbutyrylglutamine", "3-Methyl-2-oxovalerate",
  "Glutarylcarnitine",
  # saturated / atherogenic lipids (negative)
  "PC (34:1)", "PC (32:1)", "SM (d42:2)", "SM (d38:2)",
  "SM (d32:1)", "SM (d34:1)",
  # acylcarnitines / other
  "Octenoylcarnitine", "Propionylcarnitine", "Caffeine"
)

cluster_order <- c(
  # Omega-3 / phospholipids (positive)
  "LysoPC(22:6)","PC(40:6)",
  "PA(44:5)", "LysoPC(17:0)",           
  # Antioxidant / gut-microbiome
  "Indoleacrylic acid", "Ergothioneine", "Acetylornithine", 
  "Glutamine", "Phenylbutyrylglutamine",
  "3-Methyl-2-oxovalerate", "Glutarylcarnitine",  
  # Saturated / atherogenic lipids (negative)
  "PC(34:1)", "PC(32:1)", "SM(d42:2)", 
  "SM(d38:2)","SM(d32:1)", "SM(d34:1)", 
  # Acylcarnitines / other
  "Octenoylcarnitine","Propionylcarnitine", 
  "Caffeine", "Diaminonaphthalene"
)

heat_long <- wide_df %>%
  pivot_longer(-Metabolite, names_to = "Index", values_to = "Direction") %>%
  mutate(
    Metabolite = factor(Metabolite, levels = rev(cluster_order)),
    Index      = factor(Index, levels = rev(c("Veganscreener score","Veganscreener score (+)","Veganscreener score (-)","PDI","hPDI","uPDI","UPF"))),
    Fill       = case_when(
      Direction ==  1 ~ "UP",
      Direction == -1 ~ "DOWN",
      TRUE            ~ "ns"
    )
  )

panel_B <- ggplot(heat_long, aes(x = Index, y = Metabolite)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Fill), colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(heat_long, Fill %in% c("UP", "DOWN")),
    aes(shape = Fill),
    fill = "black", colour = "black", size = 2.2
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("UP" = col_up, "DOWN" = col_down, "ns" = col_na),
    name   = "Estimate",
    labels = c("UP" = "Positive", "DOWN" = "Negative", "ns" = "Not significant")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("UP" = 24, "DOWN" = 25), guide = "none") +
  coord_flip() +
  #geom_vline(xintercept = 3.5, colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    panel.grid      = element_blank()
  )

```

```{r}
panel_B
```

```{r}
f <- panel_B
save(f,file="../results/vegan/figures/F5a_AllHeatmap.RData")
```

## Plot

```{r}
load("../results/vegan/figures/F5a_AllHeatmap.RData")
f5a <- f
load("../results/vegan/figures/F5a_VMI.RData")
f5b <- f 
load("../results/vegan/figures/F5c_hPMI.RData")
f5c <- f 
load("../results/vegan/figures/F5d_uPMI.RData")
f5d <- f 
load("../results/vegan/figures/F5e_Network.RData")
f5e <- f 
```

```{r,fig.height=7,fig.width=14}
design <- "
AAAAAAAAAEEEEEE
AAAAAAAAAEEEEEE
BBBCCCDDDEEEEEE
BBBCCCDDDEEEEEE

"
f5a_free <- free(f5a, side = "rlb") 
f5b_free <- free(f5b + xlab("Metabolite-based\nVeganscreener score") + 
                   ylab("Veganscreener score"), side = "lb") 
f5c_free <- free(f5c + xlab("Metabolite-based\nhPDI"), side = "lb") 
f5d_free <- free(f5d + xlab("Metabolite-based\nuPDI"), side = "lb") 
f5e_free <- free(f5e, side = "lb") 

p <- f5a_free + f5b_free + f5c_free + f5d_free + f5e_free +
  plot_layout(design  = design,
              widths  = c(rep(1,15)),  # length 6, one per column
              heights = c(1,1,1,1)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(plot.tag    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20))

p
```

```{r}
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_5.png", height=7,width=14)
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_5.pdf", height=7,width=14)
```

# Supplementary figures

## FS1

```{r,fig.height=15,fig.width=5}
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS1.RData")
p_forest
```

## FS2

```{r,fig.height=15,fig.width=5}
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS2.RData")
p_forest
```

## FS3

```{r,fig.height=15,fig.width=5}
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS3.RData")
p_forest <- fix_labels(p_forest)

p_forest
```

```{r}
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS_VMI_plus.RData")
fsa <- f
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS_VMI_minus.RData")
fsb <- f
load("../results/vegan/figures/FS_UPF.RData")
fsc <- f
```

```{r,fig.width=10,fig.height=4}
p <- (fsa + xlab("Metabolite-based\nVeganscreener score (+)") + ylab("Veganscreener score (+) (z-scored)") |     fsb + xlab("Metabolite-based\nVeganscreener score (-)") + ylab("Veganscerener score (-) (z-scored)") | fsc) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1,1)) & 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 20, face = 'bold')) 

p
```
```{r}
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_S4.png", height=4,width=10)
ggsave(plot=p,
       filename = "../results/vegan/figures/Figure_S4.pdf", height=4,width=10)
```
